positive: A whimsical, highly stylized composition featuring a group of minimalist jungle animals—a sloth, a jaguar, and a toucan—intertwined amongst vibrant, abstracted tropical foliage and glowing vines. The scene should use strong, contrasting silhouettes reminiscent of Art Deco jungle murals. Composition must be centered, perfectly balanced, and suitable for repeating textile patterns or large format apparel prints. Use a palette of emerald green, deep sapphire blue, burnt orange, and touches of gold leaf accenting. Flat graphic style with subtle halftone texture, high contrast, vector art feel, suitable for screen printing.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, blurry, grainy, messy, distorted, artifacts, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic photo, photorealism
